title: Mighty Forever

sections.label: Intro
lines: Generate a soft, subtle track with smooth transitions.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: The Lord reigns, His majesty shines,
Robed in splendor, power divine.
The world stands firm, it won’t be moved,
Your throne eternal, ever proved.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Oceans roar, their voice ascends,
Songs of might the heavens send.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You are crowned in glory, high above all,
Endless is Your kingdom, we rise, we fall.
Mighty waves proclaim Your holy decree,
Forever unshaken, You reign over me.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Your laws stand firm, Your house secure,
Holiness adorns, it will endure.
From ages past to days unseen,
You are the constant, the reigning King.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Oceans roar, their voice ascends,
Songs of might the heavens send.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You are crowned in glory, high above all,
Endless is Your kingdom, we rise, we fall.
Mighty waves proclaim Your holy decree,
Forever unshaken, You reign over me.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Oh, the rivers clap their hands,
Mountains sing where You stand.
All creation shouts Your name,
Through the earth, Your power remains.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You are crowned in glory, high above all,
Endless is Your kingdom, we rise, we fall.
Mighty waves proclaim Your holy decree,
Forever unshaken, You reign over me.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Forever unshaken, You reign over me.
Forever unshaken, You reign over me.

epigraph: the LORD is clothed with strength
styleNote: Light Kick Drum · Building Intensity · Playful Melodies
